note: golden_hash filled by golden-parity.test.mjs --update. Vector 1 composes a workpaper record from art-367-compute-cross-border-fees's REAL shipped fixture receipt (default_seed_us_gb_reverse_charge, execution_hash + sha256-source kernel digest taken from the live node shard) -- proves the composition works against a live artifact shape, not a synthetic-only fixture. Vector 2 chains a second workpaper (art-371's estimated/section-24.6 receipt) to vector 1 via previous_workpaper_hash. Vector 3: missing engagement_id -- WORKPAPER_INPUTS_INVALID fires and every conditional output field nulls out (finite gate).
